title: Intriguing Nutty Middle Eastern Uni Ouzi
description: A nutty and springy Middle Eastern dish featuring uni and nuka-pickle, perfect for adventurous eaters, this low-carb-friendly ouzi is a unique twist on traditional flavors.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the sliced almonds and chopped pistachios.
In a small bowl, whisk together the olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, sumac, salt, and black pepper.
Add the uni to the bowl with the nut mixture and gently fold until combined.
Add the nuka-pickle to the bowl with the uni and nut mixture, and gently fold until combined.
Pour the dressing over the uni and nut mixture, and gently fold until combined.
Spoon the mixture into a baking dish and bake for 15 minutes.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the ouzi warm, garnished with additional sumac and pistachios if desired.
